news.paragraph: Datadog has experienced significant momentum following its first billion-dollar quarter and a raised 2026 revenue outlook driven by AI adoption. While Goldman Sachs maintains a sell rating despite increasing its price target to $139, the company is also scheduled to present at an upcoming investor conference. Options traders should weigh this strong fundamental growth against the conflicting analyst sentiment and upcoming investor presentations.
headlines: DDOG Q1 Deep Dive: AI Adoption and Product Expansion Drive Strong Growth
